Paxos tourist-priority evidence pass 2026-05-29: Paxos Glyfada and Paxos StoneHouse support Soulanena as a small pebbly beach by Paxos Beach Hotel, with hotel-adjacent sunbeds/restaurant context while keeping public-beach claims conservative. OSM is geometry support only.

orientation.notes: Generated from Natural Earth geospatial exposure facingDeg. This records shoreline-facing direction only; it does not verify shelter, low-wave behavior, or live sea conditions.

access.label: Εύκολο μονοπάτι
access.notes: The Thinking Traveller περιγράφει το Χαράμι στον κόλπο της Λάκκας, με πρόσβαση με σκάφος ή σύντομο σκιερό μονοπάτι από τη Λάκκα.

waterDepth.label: Ρηχά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η είσοδος/πρώτα μέτρα φαίνονται πιο ρηχά με βάση την άμεση πηγή. Δεν αποτελεί live safety claim.

sourceNotes: The Thinking Traveller, Paxos Breeze, Paxos StoneHouse, and Paxosinfo support Harami as a Lakka-bay beach with shallow water/sandy seabed, short footpath/boat access, taverna and seasonal beach services.

Paxos tourist-priority evidence pass 2026-05-29: The Thinking Traveller, Paxos Breeze, Paxos StoneHouse, and Paxosinfo support Harami as a Lakka-bay beach with shallow water/sandy seabed context, short footpath or boat access, taverna, and seasonal beach services.
